description_long: This object depicts a small residential compound featuring three distinct cabin-style buildings arranged on a rectangular plot of land. The main cabin is centrally located and features a prominent gable roof with multiple peaks, wide overhangs, and a covered porch area. Two smaller outbuildings, likely a garage and a shed, are positioned to the sides, each with simpler gable roofs and minimal ornamentation. The buildings are constructed primarily from wood, with dark brown roofs and lighter brown walls, evoking a rustic, craftsman aesthetic. The plot includes visible pathways connecting the structures, and the overall layout suggests a private, suburban or rural setting. Windows and doors are symmetrically arranged, and the main cabin's porch provides a welcoming entry point.
description: A rustic compound with three wooden cabins, gable roofs, and a central porch, set on a landscaped plot with connecting paths.
description_view_0: The main cabin with its prominent gable roof and central porch is visible, flanked by two smaller outbuildings on a green plot.
description_view_1: The rear of the main cabin and the backs of the outbuildings are visible, showing the full width of the structures and rooflines.
description_view_2: A side perspective highlights the depth of the main cabin and the spatial relationship between the three buildings.
description_view_3: The front of the main cabin with its porch is clearly visible, along with the two outbuildings positioned to the right.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gable roof with wide overhangs and asphalt shingle covering
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically distributed on the main cabin and outbuildings, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced evenly along the facades.
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade of the main cabin, with additional doors on the outbuildings facing the central area.
